title: ARIA-OS CAM Setup Sheet v2
description: Schema v2.0 — multi-process superset of v1. Adds process_type, process_parameters, consumables, quality_standards, and energy_profile. All v1 fields are preserved. Consumed by MillForge POST /api/jobs/import-from-cam after normalization by services/aria_schema.py.

schema_version.description: Must be exactly '2.0' for this schema version

machine_name.description: Target machine name from ARIA, e.g. 'Haas VF-2', 'Lincoln MIG Cell', 'Trumpf TruLaser'

process_type.description: Manufacturing process family for this setup sheet. Defaults to 'cnc_milling' if omitted for backward compatibility.

process_parameters.description: Process-specific parameters. Structure varies by process_type. For CNC: spindle_speed_rpm, feed_rate_mm_min, depth_of_cut_mm, coolant_type. For welding: travel_speed_mm_min, wire_diameter_mm, shielding_gas. For cutting: cutting_speed_mm_min, kerf_width_mm, assist_gas. All fields are optional and process-specific.

consumables.description: List of consumables required for this setup. Each entry describes one material consumed during the process.

quantity.description: Quantity consumed for this job (units given in 'unit' field)

part_number.description: Supplier part number or catalog reference

quality_standards.description: List of quality standards applicable to this job. MillForge uses these to configure the correct inspection checks.

energy_profile.description: Power consumption profile for this operation. Used by MillForge's energy optimizer to schedule during off-peak hours.

base_power_kw.description: Steady-state operating power draw in kilowatts

peak_power_kw.description: Maximum instantaneous power in kilowatts (spindle start, arc strike, etc.)

idle_power_kw.description: Power draw when machine is on but not actively cutting/welding

duty_cycle.description: Fraction of time at base power level (0.0–1.0)

cycle_time_min_estimate.description: Estimated cycle time in MINUTES (not seconds)

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when ARIA generated this setup sheet
